mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customers (name, phone, email, birth_date, grade, created_store_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{birthDate}, 'bronze', #{createdStoreId})
mapper.update: UPDATE customers SET name=#{name}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, birth_date=#{birthDate} WHERE customer_id=#{customerId}
UPDATE customers SET point_balance = point_balance + #{delta} WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_transactions (customer_id, type, amount, balance_after, description, sale_id) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{description}, #{saleId})
